auth.title: DAIcer
auth.subtitle: Digital Arcanist Interactive Creative Experience Roleplay
auth.heroDescription: Forge a living campaign with an AI Dungeon Master trained to honour lore, tension, and teamwork.

cards.sectionDescription: Swipe through the pillars that keep every table immersed—lore sync, tactical pacing, and party cohesion.

lore.title: Curated Lore
lore.body: Sync realms, factions, relic histories, and prophecies—the DM remembers every secret.

encounters.title: Adaptive Encounters
encounters.body: Calibrate the danger curve, tone, and pacing with precision narrative controls.

party.title: Party Focus
party.body: Spotlight cooperation, weaving shared glory and combined tactics into every scene.

cta.heading: Gate of Entry
cta.copy: Sign in with your adventuring charter to gather the party in moments.

secondary.title: Beyond the Gate
secondary.subtitle: Keep your table inspired between sessions.
secondary.description: Deliver actionable lore drops, session prep, and player prompts so the next gathering starts at full momentum.

tracks.title: Living Storylines
tracks.body: Surface evolving plot threads and faction agendas so everyone knows which sparks are ready to ignite.

guidance.title: Precision Prep
guidance.body: Turn encounter notes into ready scenes with pacing tips, boxed text, and suggested complications.

readiness.title: Signal Boosts
readiness.body: Share player-facing spotlights, downtime hooks, and inventory reminders to keep the party aligned.

auth.emulatorTip: Any email works in this realm.
